---
title: "Advanced Empirical Research Methods"
subtitle: Assigment 1 — README
author: "Candidate Number: 1091806"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: pdf_document
---

# MT25 Assignment 1 — File Description

**Candidate Number:** 1091806

## Part 1: Computational Macroeconomics (Julia)

All Julia scripts are in the `part1_scripts/` folder.

### Exercise 1

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `exercise1.jl` | Main script for Exercise 1: value function iteration, policy functions, and simulation |

### Exercise 2

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `ex2_kfe.jl` | Kolmogorov Forward Equation for stationary distribution |
| `ex2_parameters.jl` | Parameter definitions for Exercise 2 |
| `ex2_vfi.jl` | Value function iteration for Exercise 2 |
| `exercise2.jl` | Main script that calls all Exercise 2 modules |

## Part 2: Advanced Empirical Research Methods (R)

| File | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `AERM_part2.Rmd` | R Markdown source file containing all code, output, and written answers |
| `AERM_part2.pdf` | Compiled PDF of Part 2 |
